reference: Hello, your pain is most probably due to a pinched nerve. However, the cause of the nerve compression needs to be evaluated by performing a magnetic resonance imaging scan of your lower back. If it is extremely painful to even move, you need to discuss it with your spine specialist, as it could be a vertebral compression fracture. This can be easily treated when under the care of a good surgeon. Therefore, I urge you to see a spine surgeon and have it examined.
text: Look, you need to put policies in place.
